note: Full-history CDF from the deployed /api/latency endpoint. delta = attack blocked/detected latency_ms (bimodal: boundary block ~ms; LLM-reaching attacks add ~11s under the Groq free-tier throttle). kappa = remediation latency_ms (orchestrated: green-team poll + HTTP revoke + Docker container restart) — NOT the raw kill primitive (cmd/latency measures that at 0.5ms).
